query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(vlr AS DECIMAL(10,4))), 0) as totalVlr
FROM pro_rata 
WHERE codEst = '1' 
AND dataFinal LIKE '%/04/2026'
AND qtdFaltaReceber > 0;

SELECT nrOperacao, comissao, vlr, qtdFaltaReceber, dataFinal
FROM pro_rata 
WHERE codEst = '1' 
AND dataFinal LIKE '%/04/2026'
AND qtdFaltaReceber > 0
LIMIT 5;

SELECT nrOperacao, comissao, vlr, qtdFaltaReceber, dataFinal

AND qtdFaltaReceber > 0
